output.sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?group WHERE {
  wd:Q7283211 wdt:P154 ?season.
  ?season wdt:P231 "4".
  ?season wdt:P179 ?episode.
  ?episode rdfs:label ?epLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?epLabel) = "de" && CONTAINS(LOWER(?epLabel), "motto"))
  ?episode wdt:P1390 ?contestant.
  ?contestant wdt:P1690 ?votes.
  FILTER (isNumeric(?votes))
  ?contestant wdt:P728 ?group
} ORDER BY DESC(?votes) LIMIT 1
